title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Quiet Turkey 'U-Turn' Has Loud Consequences For India
summary_full: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier
